name: Nuts and Bolts: Screwing Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Nuts And Bolts - Screwing Puzzle is a puzzle game where your mission is to unscrew and disassemble everything! Navigate through a maze of tangled iron sheets, bolts, nuts, and plates, all pinned down by stubborn screws. Your challenge is to strategically remove all the screws to break down the structures and solve the puzzle. But watch out—you only have a limited number of spots to place the removed screws! If you find yourself stuck, don’t worry—there are plenty of hints and tools to help you out. Can you unscrew every last bolt and conquer the puzzle? How to play Nuts and Bolts: Screwing Puzzle? Click the screw and place it on an open spot. Who created Nuts and Bolts: Screwing Puzzle? Nuts and Bolts: Screwing Puzzle is created by Unico Studio.
